source.name: QS World University Rankings 2026: Top Global Universities
source.notes: Official public page reports 1504 results. Browser extraction reached 857 visible rows across the public pagination in this run; keep existing top-100 canonical file for current QS batching until this source is completed.

rankSemantics.notes: rankText preserves QS tie markers and rank bands such as =32 and 1401+.

notes: Only 857 rows were extracted from the official public pagination; do not use this file as a complete QS top-1000 source yet.
